summary: OTP Security Enhancement testing complete. All backend security features verified: phone validation against masked format, rate limiting (3 requests/10 min), cooldown (60s between requests), max 5 verify attempts before lockout, OTP audit logs stored in database. Frontend UI correctly displays all security states including phone mismatch errors, cooldown timers, remaining requests, OTP expiration time, and lockout warnings.
passed_tests: ✅ BACKEND: Phone validation rejects invalid phone format (too short)
✅ BACKEND: Phone validation rejects phone not matching masked format's last 4 digits
✅ BACKEND: Phone matching masked format is accepted
✅ BACKEND: Rate limiting - max 3 OTP requests per 10 minutes enforced
✅ BACKEND: Cooldown - 60 seconds between OTP requests enforced
✅ BACKEND: Verify attempt tracking with remaining attempts in error message
✅ BACKEND: Max 5 verify attempts before 30-minute lockout
✅ BACKEND: OTP audit logs stored in database (otp_logs collection)
✅ BACKEND: Audit logs include user_id, phone (masked), IP, action, success, reason, timestamp
✅ BACKEND: Clear error messages with remaining attempts/cooldown info
✅ BACKEND: send-otp response includes remaining_requests, cooldown_seconds, expires_in_minutes
✅ FRONTEND: Phone verification UI displays when 403 phone_verification_required returned
✅ FRONTEND: Masked phone number (+27•••2758) displayed with hint
✅ FRONTEND: Transaction preview shows item description and price
✅ FRONTEND: Phone mismatch error displayed with clear message ('should end with 2758')
✅ FRONTEND: OTP sent confirmation with expiration time (10 minutes)
✅ FRONTEND: Cooldown timer displayed ('Resend in 59s')
✅ FRONTEND: Remaining requests info displayed
✅ FRONTEND: OTP input field with 6-digit placeholder
✅ FRONTEND: Verify & Join Transaction button
✅ FRONTEND: Change number option available
✅ FRONTEND: Toast notifications for all states (success, error, cooldown)

critical_code_review_comments.comment: Lines 34-44: Rate limiting stores and constants properly defined (OTP_MAX_REQUESTS_PER_WINDOW=3, OTP_RATE_LIMIT_WINDOW_MINUTES=10, OTP_COOLDOWN_SECONDS=60, OTP_MAX_VERIFY_ATTEMPTS=5, OTP_LOCKOUT_MINUTES=30)
Lines 65-86: phone_matches_masked function correctly validates phone against masked format by comparing last 4 digits
Lines 89-108: log_otp_request function stores audit logs in otp_logs collection with all required fields
Lines 497-606: send_phone_otp endpoint implements all security features - lockout check, phone validation, rate limiting, cooldown, audit logging
Lines 609-697: verify_phone_otp endpoint implements attempt tracking, lockout after max attempts, clear error messages
Lines 62-67: OTP security state variables properly defined (remainingOtpRequests, remainingVerifyAttempts, otpExpiresIn, isLockedOut, lockoutMinutes)
Lines 208-227: validatePhoneAgainstMask helper correctly validates phone against masked format
Lines 229-292: handleSendOtp correctly handles validation, rate limiting, cooldown, and lockout states
Lines 294-370: handleVerifyOtp correctly handles attempt tracking, lockout, and error states
Lines 880-1100: Enhanced verification UI displays all error states (mismatch, lockout, expired, incorrect code) with appropriate styling

seed_data_creation: None - used existing phone-based transaction txn_adcfbcad4882
context_for_next_testing_agent: OTP Security Enhancement testing complete. All features verified: (1) Backend validates phone against masked format before sending OTP, (2) Rate limiting enforces max 3 requests per 10 minutes, (3) Cooldown enforces 60 seconds between requests, (4) Max 5 incorrect OTP attempts before 30-minute lockout, (5) All OTP requests logged to otp_logs collection with user_id, phone, IP, action, success, reason, timestamp, (6) Frontend displays all security states including mismatch errors, cooldown timers, remaining requests, expiration time, and lockout warnings. Security constants: OTP_MAX_REQUESTS_PER_WINDOW=3, OTP_RATE_LIMIT_WINDOW_MINUTES=10, OTP_COOLDOWN_SECONDS=60, OTP_MAX_VERIFY_ATTEMPTS=5, OTP_LOCKOUT_MINUTES=30.
